text.title: Scope Detection — Output Contract
text.summary: Schemas for the per-ticket triage record and the weekly dashboard. Both are consumed by the PM, the change-control board, and the engagement-close auditor.

forbidden.pattern: classifier_verdict not one of the four enum values
override_rate_per_verdict > 0.20 for any verdict over 2 consecutive weeks without rule recalibration
pushback message sent for a verdict where confidence < 0.7 without human override sign-off

allowed-transformations.transformation: Increase confidence-floor for auto-routing pushback (e.g. require ≥0.85 for unattended pushback).
Promote `ambiguous` to `pm_review` after 24h with no PM action; do not silently default to a verdict.
Add per-requester routing rules (e.g. always pm_review for the client sponsor) without changing the verdict logic.

list.item: Every triage record has citations referring to the current baseline version
Verdict is one of the four enum values
Human override workflow is reachable from the ticket UI
Weekly dashboard shows override rate per verdict; alerts when >20%
Audit log retention ≥ engagement duration + 12 months
